fn f(a: A): produce A / {} := produce (a : A)
---
f : (A) -> produce A / {}
==========
fn f(a: A): produce B / {} := produce (a : B)
---
ERROR: type mismatch
==========
fn f(a: A): produce A / {} := let x = produce (a : A) in produce x
---
f : (A) -> produce A / {}
==========
fn f(a: A): produce A / {} := produce (a)
---
f : (A) -> produce A / {}
==========
data Bool { .true, .false }
fn f(b: Bool): produce A / {} := produce (b : A)
---
ERROR: type mismatch
